%_FLOWLOGIC																																
PROCESS BEFORE OUTPUT.																																
  MODULE status_0100.																																
  MODULE active_tab.  "TAB																																
  MODULE set_fcat_layout.																																
  MODULE create_alv.																																
  MODULE modify_screen.																																
																																
  CALL SUBSCREEN tab_sca INCLUDING sy-repid gv_screen.																																
																																
PROCESS AFTER INPUT.																																
																																
  CALL SUBSCREEN tab_sca.																																
  MODULE get_pressed.																																
																																
  MODULE exit_0100 AT EXIT-COMMAND.																																
  MODULE user_command_0100.
